name: Sunset Pier Walk
description: A quiet waterfront stretch with golden-hour views, sea breeze, and just enough calm to reset your evening.

name: Paper Lantern Library
description: An intimate reading room above a cafe, known for soft lighting, window-side tables, and low-key focus energy.

name: Terrace Bloom House
description: A floral rooftop tucked behind old lanes, perfect for slow coffee, soft conversations, and city skyline photos.

name: Willow Courtyard Cafe
description: A leafy courtyard cafe hidden behind a bookstore lane, with soft jazz, cold brew, and a slow afternoon mood.

name: Blue Hour Steps
description: Stone steps leading to a tucked-away shoreline where the post-sunset light makes everything feel cinematic.

name: Quiet Chapter Loft
description: A compact top-floor reading loft with long desks, warm lamps, and the kind of silence that helps you focus.

name: Cafe Bahar
description: A best place for Authentic Hyderbadi Biriyani.
